title: oxybasis macrosperma
intro: Oxybasis macrosperma, also known as redstem smartweed or pale smartweed, is a plant species belonging to the family Amaranthaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, and is also used to treat digestive issues and fever. Oxybasis macrosperma can be consumed as a herbal tea or used in infusions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
